classFeatures.name: Esoteric Discovery
classFeatures.description: At 1st level, 3rd level, and every 3 levels thereafter, a ritualist selects one skill. When using that skill to cast an occult ritual, the ritualist can take 10 on the skill check, but only once per skill during any given ritual.

classFeatures.name: Student Of Mysteries
classFeatures.description: A ritualist adds half her ritualist level (minimum 1) as a bonus on Intelligence checks made to learn new occult rituals.

classFeatures.name: Stabilize Ritual
classFeatures.description: At 2nd level, once per day as a full-round action , a ritualist can refocus a ritual that has been paused, removing any increases to the ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs skill check DCs that have accrued thus far due to pausing the ritual.

classFeatures.name: Esoteric Discovery
classFeatures.description: At 1st level, 3rd level, and every 3 levels thereafter, a ritualist selects one skill. When using that skill to cast an occult ritual, the ritualist can take 10 on the skill check, but only once per skill during any given ritual.

classFeatures.name: Occult Expertise
classFeatures.description: At 3rd level, a ritualist adds half her class level as a bonus on all skill checks when using occult skill unlocks. Additionally, a ritualist can take 10 on skill checks when using occult skill unlocks with skills chosen with the esoteric discovery ability.

classFeatures.name: Cautious Rituals
classFeatures.description: At 4th level, once per day when beginning to cast a ritual as the primary caster, a ritualist can decide to cast the ritual as a cautious ritual. The DCs of a cautious ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs skill checks increase by half the ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs level (rounded down, minimum 1). However, if the ritual fails, there is a cumulative 10% chance per ritualist level (40% at 4th level, 50% at 5th level, and so on) that the ritual causes none of its usual failure or backlash effects. The ritual still causes backlash if it succeeds. At 6th level, the ritualistГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs successful cautious rituals do not cause any backlash to any of their secondary casters. At 8th level, a ritualist can cast a cautious ritual without increasing the ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs skill check DCs.

classFeatures.name: Expedited Rituals
classFeatures.description: At 5th level, once per day when beginning to cast a ritual as the primary caster, a ritualist can decide to cast the ritual as an expedited ritual. The DCs of an expedited ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs skill checks increase by half the ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs level (rounded down). However, the ritualist can cast the ritual as soon as its casters succeed at the requisite number of skill checks rather than waiting for the ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs full casting time to elapse. A ritual can be both cautious and expedited, but the penalties stack. At 9th level, a ritualist can cast an expedited ritual without increasing the ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs skill check DCs.

classFeatures.name: Esoteric Discovery
classFeatures.description: At 1st level, 3rd level, and every 3 levels thereafter, a ritualist selects one skill. When using that skill to cast an occult ritual, the ritualist can take 10 on the skill check, but only once per skill during any given ritual.

classFeatures.name: Independent Rituals
classFeatures.description: At 7th-level, a ritualist becomes so adept at casting rituals that secondary casters are unnecessary. Once per day when beginning to cast a ritual as the primary caster, the ritualist can decide to cast the ritual as an independent ritual. The ritualist gains a bonus on all skill checks attempted as part of casting the ritual equal to half the ritualistГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs level, and she can always take 10 when using skills she chose for her esoteric discovery ability. However, none of the ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs secondary casters, if any, can attempt any of the ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs skill checks. The ritualist can still include secondary casters as part of a ritual, if it allows secondary casters, to grant them the ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs effects. An independent ritual can also be cast as an expedited or cautious ritual (or both).

classFeatures.name: Focused Rituals
classFeatures.description: At 8th level, a ritualist can maintain a ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs focus even under dire circumstances. While performing a ritual as the primary caster, the ritualist can continue the ritual even if some or all of its secondary casters are incapacitated, killed, or moved out of range of the ritual.

classFeatures.name: Esoteric Discovery
classFeatures.description: At 1st level, 3rd level, and every 3 levels thereafter, a ritualist selects one skill. When using that skill to cast an occult ritual, the ritualist can take 10 on the skill check, but only once per skill during any given ritual.

classFeatures.name: Master Of Mysteries
classFeatures.description: At 10th level, a ritualistГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs knowledge of the occult reaches unfathomable depths, and she can perform rituals with disturbing alacrity. Once per day when casting a ritual as the primary caster, the ritualist can reduce the casting time from 10 minutes per ritual level to 1 round per ritual level, or from 1 hour per ritual level to 1 minute per ritual level. One of the ritualГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вўs casters attempts a check every round or every minute of the casting instead of every 10 minutes or every hour, as appropriate.
